posts.title: Welcome to Japoll Analysis
posts.excerpt: A new home for original posts, race updates, and deeper looks at the numbers.
posts.body:
This is the new home for Japoll's written analysis. Future posts can cover individual races, changes in the forecast, polling trends, and anything else that deserves a closer look.

Posts are written and published from the Japoll Editor, so new analysis can be added without changing the site's code.
